cpu: AMD A8-3850 APU with Radeon HD Graphics
notes: PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 does the trick. UE4 DX11 game. Game menu changes (resolution or trying to click on online play) might cause a crash, though. See the crash text message for details (points to pointers?). Otherwise, the game itself runs fine and performant. Gamepad works. Fullscreen or Windowed works. High framerate. No rendering issues.
title: Fuel Renegades

notes: No issues. Played with xbox one controller
